faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about DairyFlow. Can't find an answer?

items.question: Is there a free trial available?
items.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required. You can explore the platform, set up your dairy operations, and see the value before committing to a paid plan.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, and digital wallets. For enterprise customers, we also offer invoice-based billing with flexible payment terms.

items.question: Can I change my plan later?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, changes take effect at the next billing cycle.

items.question: Are there any hidden fees?
items.answer: No hidden fees whatsoever. The pricing you see is all-inclusive. There are no setup fees, no per-transaction charges, and no surprise costs. Everything is transparent.

items.question: How long does it take to get started?
items.answer: You can be up and running in under 30 minutes! Simply create an account, add your products and delivery team, import your customer list (or add them manually), and you're ready to start deliveries.

items.question: Do I need any technical knowledge to set up?
items.answer: Not at all! DairyFlow is designed to be user-friendly for everyone. Our intuitive interface guides you through each step, and our onboarding wizard makes setup a breeze. Plus, our support team is always ready to help.

items.question: Can I import my existing customer data?
items.answer: Yes! You can easily import customer data from Excel spreadsheets or CSV files. Our smart import tool maps your columns automatically and handles duplicates. You can also sync with your existing systems via our API.

items.question: What devices and browsers are supported?
items.answer: DairyFlow works on all modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and devices. Our mobile apps for delivery personnel work on both Android and iOS. The platform is fully responsive and works great on tablets too.

items.question: How does the route optimization work?
items.answer: Our AI-powered route optimization analyzes delivery locations, traffic patterns, time windows, and vehicle capacity to create the most efficient routes. This typically reduces delivery time by 30% and fuel costs by 25%.

items.question: Can customers track their deliveries in real-time?
items.answer: Yes! Customers receive real-time updates via push notifications and can track their delivery on a live map. They'll know exactly when their milk is on the way and when it's delivered.

items.question: How does the loyalty program work?
items.answer: Customers earn points on every purchase which they can redeem for discounts or free products. You can customize point values, create tier levels (Silver, Gold, Platinum), and set up special bonus events to boost engagement.

items.question: Can I manage multiple dairy outlets?
items.answer: Yes! Our Professional and Enterprise plans support multi-location management. You can oversee all outlets from a single dashboard, compare performance, and share resources like delivery personnel across locations.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use bank-grade encryption (256-bit SSL), regular security audits, and comply with data protection regulations. Your data is backed up daily and stored in secure, redundant data centers.

items.question: What kind of support do you offer?
items.answer: We offer multiple support channels: in-app chat support, email support, phone support (for Professional and above), and a comprehensive knowledge base. Enterprise customers also get a dedicated account manager.

items.question: Can I integrate with other tools I use?
items.answer: Yes! We offer integrations with popular accounting software (Tally, QuickBooks), payment gateways, SMS providers, and more. Our REST API also allows custom integrations with your existing systems.
